description_long: This is a large rectangular wooden picnic table set with six matching chairs, three on each side, and a slatted tabletop design. The table and chairs are constructed from medium-toned wood, with visible grain and a natural finish, giving a warm and inviting appearance. The chairs feature high, slatted backs and foldable legs, suggesting portability and ease of storage. The tabletop is composed of two main panels with a central seam, and the legs are sturdy, rectangular blocks providing stable support. The overall design is modern yet classic, suitable for communal dining or gatherings. There is no visible umbrella hole in the center of the tabletop.
description: A large rectangular wooden picnic table with six matching slatted chairs, featuring a natural wood finish and sturdy block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table and all six chairs, with the slatted backs of the chairs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular tabletop, the arrangement of three chairs on each side, and the block-style table legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the backs of the chairs and the symmetry of the table set.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tabletop, chair arrangement, and the robust support structure beneath.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by two wide, rectangular wooden legs at each end, connected by a central crossbeam for added stability.
